# Intersection Point Solving

## Short Teaching Summary
To find a time when two objects are at the same distance from a reference point, you set their distance equations equal to each other and solve for the time variable.

## Difficulty
0.00

## Prerequisites
- Solving linear equations

## Related Concepts
- Solving linear equations (requires)
